title: I ran 1 mile every day for 30 days
description:
Go to http://squarespace.com for a free trial, and when you’re ready to launch, go to http://squarespace.com/mattdavella to save 10% off your first purchase of a website or domain.


Support Alex and his children's charity fundraiser: https://alexsoutandback.com.au/

Thanks to Ben Liddy from Central Performance: https://centralperformance.com.au/

Want to learn how to make better videos and grow your YouTube channel? I have a course on that: https://mattdavella.com/youtube

New here? I'm Matt 👋 I made an award-winning documentary called Minimalism a few years ago and now I make YouTube videos. Please subscribe so my mother-in-law thinks this is a better career than being a doctor.
